location.countryDescription: Your country for regional formatting and context.

typing.autoCapitalisationDescription: Automatically capitalise the first letter when typing a message.

apiConnection.description: How your AI agents connect to language models.
apiConnection.claudeProMax: Claude Pro/Max — using your Claude subscription
apiConnection.apiKey: API Key — Anthropic, OpenRouter, or compatible API

aboutLabels.title: About Labels
aboutLabels.paragraph1: Labels help you organize sessions with colored tags. Use them to categorize conversations by project, topic, or priority — making it easy to filter and find related sessions later.
aboutLabels.paragraph2: Each label can optionally carry a value with a specific type (text, number, or date). This turns labels into structured metadata — for example, a "priority" label with value 3, or a "due" label with a date.
aboutLabels.paragraph3: Auto-apply rules assign labels automatically when a message matches a regex pattern. For example, pasting a Linear issue URL can auto-tag the session with the project name and issue ID — no manual tagging needed.

labelHierarchy.title: Label Hierarchy
labelHierarchy.description: All labels configured for this workspace. Labels can be nested to form groups.
labelHierarchy.emptyHint: Labels can be created by the agent or by editing labels/config.json in your workspace.

autoRules.title: Auto-Apply Rules
autoRules.description: Regex patterns that automatically apply labels when matched in user messages. For example, paste a Linear issue URL and automatically tag the session with the project name and issue ID.

aboutPermissions.title: About Permissions
aboutPermissions.paragraph1: Permissions control how much autonomy your agent has. In Explore mode, the agent can only read and research — perfect for understanding a problem before committing to changes. When you're ready, switch to Execute mode to let the agent implement the plan autonomously.
aboutPermissions.paragraph2: A good workflow: start in Explore to let the agent investigate, review the proposed plan, then execute with confidence.

defaultPermissions.title: Default Permissions
defaultPermissions.description: App-level patterns allowed in Explore mode. Commands not on this list are blocked.

workspaceCustomizations.title: Workspace Customizations
workspaceCustomizations.description: Workspace-level patterns that extend the app defaults above.
workspaceCustomizations.emptyHint: Create a permissions.json file in your workspace to add custom rules.

modeCycling.title: Mode Cycling
modeCycling.description: Select which modes to cycle through with Shift+Tab
